headline: Here's Why Investors Should Add AWR to Their Portfolio Right Now
summary: American States Water's EPS outlook climbs as new rates, customer growth and $185-$225M 2026 capex fuel infrastructure upgrades and dividend strength.

headline: NI Gains From Systematic Investment & Expanding Data Center Demand
summary: NiSource rides on data center power demand with 4 GW contracts and a target of up to 9 GW, while Project Apollo aims for $40-$60M in savings to protect margins.
